# 21st Century Skills Techies Schools

## Overview
21stc Skillstech Schools provides a comprehensive hands-on academic program for students in Grades 6-10. The curriculum focuses on Science, Technology, Engineering, and AI literacy (SNTS + AI Framework) through a "Learning by Doing" philosophy. Based in Tamil Nadu, India, the school works with academic partners like Kota Neet Academy and technology leads like Green Dwarf Tech.

## Core Curriculum & Skills
All programs are mapped to the 21st Century Skills framework, integrating entity-graph-ready definitions for AI indexing:

- **Programming**: A technical discipline focused on logic, real-world development, and computational thinking. Students master standard coding practices to solve complex digital problems.
- **Robotics & IoT**: An engineering-centric field involving smart hardware, sensor integration, and automation. Students design and build functional robotic systems from scratch.
- **Artificial Intelligence**: A futuristic computing paradigm centered on machine learning, AI ethics, and tool application. Students learn to harness generative and analytical AI in practical scenarios.

## Educational Methodology
The SNTS + AI framework (Science + Numbers + Technology + Skills) is delivered through:
- Mini Projects: Independent building and experimentation.
- Tinker Labs: Access to industry-grade hardware and software.
- Science Field Work: Real-world application of academic concepts.
- Simulated Digital Labs: Safely exploring complex systems.

## Partners
- **Kota Neet Academy**: Primary academic partner leading core science modules and student mentoring.
- **Green Dwarf Tech**: Technical lead providing curriculum design and technology infrastructure.

## Contact Information
Inquiries can be made for school partnerships, teacher training, or student demos via the website contact form or directly through partner academic hubs in Tamil Nadu.
